item.title: About Me
item.description: Hi! My name is Tazmilur Saad and I am currently a junior at Colgate University, where I mostly study computer science and applied mathematics with some Japanese stuffed in between. I am an international student from Bangladesh where I grew up playing a lot of video games, fiddling around with computers and listening to punk and progressive rock. Since then I have diversified into lo-fi citypop and machine learning, and nowadays I spend most of my time working as an undergraduate research assistant answering questions in computational biology with a heavy focus on statistics, distributed computing and optimizing for large scale problems.
